steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The goal asks to “specify when Kenorland formed.” This means the answer must include the specific timing information from the notes about Kenorland's formation—not vague language, not general background, not just its definition.

steps.title: Evaluate which choice accomplishes the goal
steps.content:
B directly incorporates the timing information from the notes: “about 2.6 billion years ago.”
  • A uses imprecise timing (“Long ago” doesn't specify)
  • C discusses the supercontinent cycle process rather than Kenorland's formation
  • D identifies what a supercontinent is without addressing timing
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
